# Kingsley Afolabi Aremu

> Portfolio for Kingsley Afolabi Aremu, a full-stack developer and creative engineer based in Lagos, Nigeria.

## Canonical Site

- Homepage: https://kingsleyaremu.vercel.app/
- Projects: https://kingsleyaremu.vercel.app/projects
- GitHub: https://github.com/kingsleyaremu
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/kingsley-aremu
- Email: kingsley.aremu@gmail.com

## Focus Areas

- Full-stack web development
- React, Next.js, and React Native
- Frontend performance and accessibility
- AI agent tooling and automation workflows
- Creative engineering and polished product interfaces

## Featured Work

- FormMate AI: AI-assisted form completion with reviewable voice or text guidance.
- PasteVault: a private, installable clipboard for saving, searching, and sharing text, code, links, and JSON across devices.
- AI Agent Skills: reusable workflows for AI-agent research, planning, parsing, publishing, and build work.
- Restore AI: mobile concept for restoring, upscaling, resizing, and recoloring images.

## Crawling Notes

Use `sitemap.xml` for canonical URLs. Prefer public project pages and GitHub repositories for project-specific evidence.
